statements.sql: INSERT INTO silver.FactInternetSales (SalesOrderNumber, SalesOrderLineNumber, ProductKey, CustomerKey, SalesTerritoryKey, OrderQuantity, UnitPrice, ExtendedAmount, SalesAmount, TaxAmt, Freight, OrderDate, DueDate, ShipDate) SELECT h.SalesOrderNumber, CAST(d.SalesOrderDetailID % 127 AS TINYINT) AS SalesOrderLineNumber, d.ProductID AS ProductKey, h.CustomerID AS CustomerKey, h.TerritoryID AS SalesTerritoryKey, d.OrderQty AS OrderQuantity, d.UnitPrice, CAST(d.UnitPrice * d.OrderQty AS MONEY) AS ExtendedAmount, d.LineTotal AS SalesAmount, CAST(h.TaxAmt / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS TaxAmt, CAST(h.Freight / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS Freight, h.OrderDate, h.DueDate, h.ShipDate FROM bronze.SalesOrderHeader h JOIN bronze.SalesOrderDetail d ON h.SalesOrderID = d.SalesOrderID

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT h.SalesOrderNumber, CAST(d.SalesOrderDetailID % 127 AS TINYINT) AS SalesOrderLineNumber, d.ProductID AS ProductKey, h.CustomerID AS CustomerKey, h.TerritoryID AS SalesTerritoryKey, d.OrderQty AS OrderQuantity, d.UnitPrice, CAST(d.UnitPrice * d.OrderQty AS MONEY) AS ExtendedAmount, d.LineTotal AS SalesAmount, CAST(h.TaxAmt / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS TaxAmt, CAST(h.Freight / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS Freight, h.OrderDate, h.DueDate, h.ShipDate FROM bronze.SalesOrderHeader h JOIN bronze.SalesOrderDetail d ON h.SalesOrderID = d.SalesOrderID
refactor.refactored_sql: WITH import_sales_order_header AS ( SELECT h.SalesOrderID, h.SalesOrderNumber, h.CustomerID, h.TerritoryID, h.TaxAmt, h.Freight, h.OrderDate, h.DueDate, h.ShipDate FROM bronze.SalesOrderHeader h ), import_sales_order_detail AS ( SELECT d.SalesOrderID, d.SalesOrderDetailID, d.ProductID, d.OrderQty, d.UnitPrice, d.LineTotal FROM bronze.SalesOrderDetail d ), logical_sales_order_line_items AS ( SELECT h.SalesOrderNumber, CAST(d.SalesOrderDetailID % 127 AS TINYINT) AS SalesOrderLineNumber, d.ProductID AS ProductKey, h.CustomerID AS CustomerKey, h.TerritoryID AS SalesTerritoryKey, d.OrderQty AS OrderQuantity, d.UnitPrice, CAST(d.UnitPrice * d.OrderQty AS MONEY) AS ExtendedAmount, d.LineTotal AS SalesAmount, CAST(h.TaxAmt / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS TaxAmt, CAST(h.Freight / COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY h.SalesOrderID) AS MONEY) AS Freight, h.OrderDate, h.DueDate, h.ShipDate FROM import_sales_order_header h JOIN import_sales_order_detail d ON h.SalesOrderID = d.SalesOrderID ), final AS ( SELECT SalesOrderNumber, SalesOrderLineNumber, ProductKey, CustomerKey, SalesTerritoryKey, OrderQuantity, UnitPrice, ExtendedAmount, SalesAmount, TaxAmt, Freight, OrderDate, DueDate, ShipDate FROM logical_sales_order_line_items ) SELECT * FROM final

source_tables.summary: Both queries use bronze.SalesOrderHeader and bronze.SalesOrderDetail as source tables.

output_columns.summary: Both queries produce identical columns in the same order: SalesOrderNumber, SalesOrderLineNumber, ProductKey, CustomerKey, SalesTerritoryKey, OrderQuantity, UnitPrice, ExtendedAmount, SalesAmount, TaxAmt, Freight, OrderDate, DueDate, ShipDate.

joins.summary: Both queries use an inner JOIN on h.SalesOrderID = d.SalesOrderID with identical join semantics.

filters.summary: Both queries have no WHERE clause filters; equivalence preserved.

aggregation_grain.summary: Both queries apply identical window functions: COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY SalesOrderID) for distributing TaxAmt and Freight across detail rows.
